title: Shakira, Madonna, Justin Bieber and BTS perform at colourful World Cup half-time show
summary_full: Robbie Williams and Jennifer Hudson also performed, with Kylie Jenner and Timothee Chalamet among the celebrities in the crowds.
summary_public: Robbie Williams and Jennifer Hudson also performed, with Kylie Jenner and Timothee Chalamet among the celebrities in the crowds.
